title: Cherry Shrimp
body: Cherry Shrimp is a small mod that adds one new entity, the Cherry Shrimp to the game! They naturally spawn in jungle biomes and are bred and tamed with carrots! If the two Cherry Shrimp that are bred are the same color, the baby will be the color of the parents, otherwise, the baby will be brown! They normally come in 8 different varieties, those being red, orange, blue, yellow, purple, brown, white, and black, with a special ninth variety, the Ghost Shrimp, spawning in October!
